contributor_note: Seeded from common horticultural knowledge. Needs primary source verification.

habit.note: Thrives in deep shade — ideal for the darkest north-facing windowsill.

notes: Clover-shaped leaves with intense lemon flavour. Thrives in deep shade — one of very few culinary plants for truly dark windowsills. Used in Nordic fine dining. Delicate — use as garnish rather than cooking ingredient.
